CONTENT.Club career: Nyamsi is a youth exponent from Stade Rennais. He made his Ligue 1 debut on 10 September 2017 against Marseille. He played the full game.On 30 August 2021, he signed a four-year contract with Strasbourg.On 1 February 2024, Nyamsi moved to the Russian Premier League club Lokomotiv Moscow and signed a contract until June 2027.
CONTENT.Personal life: Nyamsi was born in France and is of Cameroonian descent.
CONTENT.External links: Gerzino Nyamsi – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in FrenchProfile at L'ÉquipeGerzino Nyamsi at the French Football Federation (in French)Gerzino Nyamsi at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)

SUMMARY: Gerzino Nyamsi (born 22 January 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Russian club Lokomotiv Moscow.
